justification: Luminosity soft masks: the structural arms are near-exact (the sampled-/TR + gs-anchor arm is byte-exact at 72dpi). The divergence is (a) the masked-text arm's substituted letterforms — Liberation Bold vs the oracle's Nimbus for the non-embedded Helvetica-Bold, the std14-styles ratchet argument under a gradient mask — and (b) the gradient-mask arm carrying the known axial-ramp divergence (see shading-axial's ratchet) into the alpha channel, where straight-alpha comparison amplifies color deltas at near-zero alpha (an alpha-2-vs-4 edge pixel quantizes its unpremultiplied color 64 apart). Measured worst (2026-07-11, @72dpi): 1.76% over d24, 3.27% over d8, mean 2.60; bounds ~25% above so real regressions still trip.
